global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call to action and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback with a free trial.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ClearLedger' in a clean font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: A large, bold text area that reads 'Earn cashback daily' in a prominent font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: A smaller text area below the main text that reads 'No hidden fees', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button with the text 'Try for free', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: A collection of circular and rectangular shapes in the background, adding visual interest without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that occupies a central position, potentially a placeholder or decorative feature.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another unspecified element that appears in the center, possibly a decorative shape or graphic.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom of the ad, likely serving a decorative purpose.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned near the bottom, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Background area
elements.description: A solid color background that provides a cohesive backdrop for the text and elements in the ad.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Try for free

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: A smaller headline text at the top left, indicating the brand name 'ClearLedger' in a clear font.

embedding_texts.global_text: ClearLedger, cashback service, native format, minimalist with soft colors, key elements include logo, body text, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main body text in the center, with the call to action button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ClearLedger, Earn cashback daily, No hidden fees, Try for free
